creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
I found some useful information via SUSE forums:

https://lists.opensuse.org/archives/list/factory@lists.opensuse.org/thread/M53D4PDB2Q5FIJA6XU4KPLJBPM362VUT/

Looks like the qt bug is https://bugreports.qt.io/browse/QTBUG-117944

I'll try to cook up a patch including the upstream fix.
